item.title: Report a Problem with Food Online Recall
item.product: Report a Problem with Food Online
item.summary: If you have a problem with a food product, let FSIS know or find the appropriate public health organization. Report Problem PHA-05042026-01 Public Health Alert Mislabeling Unreported Allergens
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased the affected meat, poultry, or egg product.
item.remedy: Do not consume affected products; follow USDA FSIS recall or public health alert instructions.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, disposal, or return instructions if stated by the official notice
